use_cases: Creates an animated dot particle background for landing pages and hero sections
Adds visual motion effects behind content on marketing websites and product demos
Provides decorative animated backgrounds for full-screen sections
Serves as a loading or ambient visual effect for pages or modals
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated dot particle system that renders colorful, smoothly moving dots across the screen. Supports fullScreen mode with configurable dot count, radius, speed range, colors, and blend modes. Designed as a decorative background effect for hero sections, landing pages, or ambient visual enhancements using requestAnimationFrame for fluid continuous animation.
